message:
fix(overprompting): add missing button type attributes for accessibility

Add explicit type="button" attributes to interactive button elements
in the overprompting visualization components:

- ConstraintViz: SLICE and Reset buttons
- PlanExecuteViz: Plan/Execute mode toggle buttons

This prevents buttons from being treated as form submit buttons by
default, which could cause unexpected page behavior if these
components are ever used within a form context. It also improves
accessibility by making button semantics explicit for screen readers.

Also includes minor whitespace normalization from editor formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
